name: counsel-day-app
description: Counsel.day backend · Next.js 15 + Drizzle + Postgres. Self-hosted on Hetzner CAX11 behind Caddy.

scripts.audit:all: node scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/perf-audit.mjs && node scripts/a11y-audit.mjs

//overrides_notes: Surgical security overrides for transitive vulnerabilities. Each traced via 'npm ls <pkg>' before pinning. Fixed: postcss (next 15.5.x bundled an old 8.4.31 with the </style> XSS · forced 8.5.10+), uuid (gaxios + @sentry/webpack-plugin pulled in 9.0.1 with v3/v5/v6 buffer bounds bug · forced 11.1.1+), esbuild at the top level. Remaining 4 vulns are all the same root cause: drizzle-kit transitively depends on the abandoned @esbuild-kit/core-utils which pins esbuild to ~0.18. Nested override can't reach it. GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99 affects esbuild's --serve dev-server only · we NEVER run it (drizzle-kit uses esbuild for one-shot TS->JS compilation of migration files; tsx for db:migrate; no dev-server code path is reachable). Risk accepted until drizzle-kit migrates off @esbuild-kit upstream. See docs/SECURITY_HARDENING.md.
